description_long: This is a compact, single-story cabin with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are finished in a textured gray material, likely stucco or concrete, with white trim around the roofline and openings. One side features a standard-sized window with a white frame, while another side has a single door, also framed in white, slightly ajar. The opposite side of the cabin showcases a large sliding glass door, providing ample natural light and access to the interior. The remaining side is solid, with no openings, emphasizing privacy and structural simplicity. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for urban infill or backyard use.
description: A modern, flat-roofed cabin with gray textured walls, white trim, and a mix of window, door, and large sliding glass door openings. Its minimalist design is compact and functional.
description_view_0: This view shows a gray wall with a single, white-framed window centered on the facade.
description_view_1: This side features a plain gray wall with a single, white-framed door positioned to the right.
description_view_2: A solid gray wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and simplicity.
description_view_3: This view highlights a large, white-framed sliding glass door spanning much of the wall, revealing part of the interior.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with minimal overhang and a raised white trim border
attribute_window_arrangement: One medium-sized, rectangular window centered on one wall and a large sliding glass door on the opposite wall, creating an asymmetrical and functional window arrangement
attribute_door_placement: One standard door on the right side of one wall and a large sliding glass door on the opposite wall
